key_schema_findings: CSV cols: agg_trade_id,price,quantity,first_trade_id,last_trade_id,transact_time,is_buyer_maker. ZIP contains one CSV.
timestamp_precision: transact_time: 13-digit ms on 2024-12-31; 16-digit MICROSECOND from 2025-01-01 onward (verified on archive files, not REST).
unit_conventions: price quote USDT; quantity base BTC
missing_interval_semantics: archive is complete daily file; no per-row missing semantics
revision_replacement_behavior: provider publishes .CHECKSUM sidecar; replacement register (updates/) lists old→new checksums

missing_interval_semantics: kline emitted per bucket even if empty (volume 0)

key_schema_findings: perp aggTrades has header row: agg_trade_id,price,quantity,first_trade_id,last_trade_id,transact_time,is_buyer_maker. transact_time ms. trades file is per-trade (non-aggregated).
timestamp_precision: ms epoch UTC (perp files stay ms, unlike spot µs)

key_schema_findings: CSV cols: calc_time,funding_interval_hours,last_funding_rate. NOTE: field is last_funding_rate, NOT fundingRate.
(NOT ACQUIRED: host unreachable) expected CSV per pair per day; OHLCVT cols time,open,high,low,close,vwap,volume,count.
unit_conventions: volume base (XBT), price quote (USD); pairs prefixed XXBTZUSD
missing_interval_semantics: no-trade OHLCVT intervals: UNVERIFIED (must confirm omission vs zero-fill)
revision_replacement_behavior: bulk files are point-in-time snapshots; reconstruction from trades may differ

key_schema_findings: REST OHLC capped at 720 entries; Trades open-ended. Incremental only.
(NOT ACQUIRED: host unreachable) expected gzipped CSV per day; trades: instId,side,sz,px,tradeId,ts; funding: instId,fundingRate,fundingTime,formulaType; L2: bids/asks/ts.
unit_conventions: linear SWAP ctVal=0.01 BTC; sz contracts
revision_replacement_behavior: provider may correct/replace; formulaType changes over time

unit_conventions: INVERSE BTCUSD: size=contracts (~USD notional); HOME notional in USD. LINEAR BTCUSDT: size in base BTC; grossValue in satoshis. Unit divergence confirmed.

key_schema_findings: instruments-info (launchTime,deliveryTime,contractType,fundingInterval); funding/history (capped <=100 recent, cursor None); tickers (volume24h base, turnover24h quote). Pagination demonstrated on instruments-info.

CATALOG: asset,full_name,metrics[{metric,frequencies[{frequency,min_time,max_time,community}]}]. TIMESERIES: FLAT array [{asset,time,metric:value,...}] (NOT nested series). Issued supply metric = SplyCur (SplyIssued unsupported). Also SplyExNtv (excluded/locked), SplyCur.
unit_conventions: native units; SplyCur = ISSUED (not circulating float); SplyExNtv = excluded/locked; future unissued NOT in any supply metric
missing_interval_semantics: per-metric frequency ranges give availability min/max; absence = missing for that asset/metric
revision_replacement_behavior: server-side; catalog reflects current availability; ranges can expand (backfill) or revise
status_fields: presence/absence of observation = missing vs unsupported; community:true flag

missing_interval_semantics: recomputed each query; not a fixed file

key_schema_findings: (old SDK path 404; CURRENT repo located in correction) TS adapter per protocol; upstream=contracts/subgraphs; emits unlocked/emitted.
missing_interval_semantics: adapter output recomputed; not fixed historical file
revision_replacement_behavior: adapter code may change; pin commit

key_schema_findings: (Tokenomist UNREACHABLE) expected per-token unlock schedule + emissions + vesting. On-chain vesting = authoritative point-in-time.
(not queried) block timestamps + indexer publication times differ.
